title: Addiction Counseling and Rehabilitation Master's Program Mission and Vision
content:
Addiction Counseling and Rehabilitation Master's Program Mission and Vision

Mission

The mission of the Addiction Counseling and Rehabilitation Thesis and Non-Thesis Master's Program is to train well-equipped, specialized scientists who can look at addiction in a comprehensive way from scientific, political, social, ethical, practice and rehabilitation perspectives and conduct original research on addiction in order to eliminate the lack of professionals working in the field of addiction in Turkey.

Vision

Addiction Counseling and Rehabilitation Thesis and Non-Thesis Master's Program aims that all healthcare professionals working in the field of addiction receive training from experts on this subject. It aims to train individuals who can understand and treat addiction and the disease process, publish publications in this field, transfer their knowledge and experience in congresses, conferences and meetings, and work in coordination with all institutions working in the field of addiction.
